error_signature: Workflow Webhook Error: Workflow could not be started!
title: Webhook fails to start workflow
symptom: When triggering a webhook, n8n returns a 'Workflow could not be started!' error. This prevents the workflow from executing as expected.
root_cause: The error occurs due to a compatibility issue with the latest n8n version, which may introduce breaking changes or bugs affecting webhook functionality. Downgrading to a previous stable version resolves this issue.
fix_steps: Test the webhook again to ensure it triggers the workflow
agent_instruction: Downgrade n8n to version 1.120.4 and restart the instance.
